name: Jackalopes Indoor Golf and Games
about: Jackalopes Indoor Golf and Games is an indoor entertainment venue featuring a 19-hole blacklight mini-golf course and multiple simulator bays. The facility offers professional golf courses from around the world, an analytical driving range, and a variety of other sports simulations including baseball, soccer, bowling, and zombie dodgeball. Pricing is based on bay rentals by the hour, with options for individual use, parties, and private event rentals. The venue is designed for groups and families seeking a fun, all-weather entertainment experience with both golf and multisport activities available.
why_golfers_like_it: Wide variety of professional golf courses available
Analytical driving range with Uneekor sensor technology
Multi-sport simulator options for diverse entertainment
